# Nischal Nikit

> Personal portfolio of Nischal Nikit - software engineer building for the web. Essays, talks, experiments, and work history.

## About

Nischal Nikit builds things that live on the web. This site is his corner of the internet: work experience, side projects, technical writing, and talks.

- Site: https://www.nischalnikit.xyz
- Blog: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz
- GitHub: https://github.com/niiischall
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/niiischall

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/): Introduction and social links
- [About](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/about): Background and overview
- [Work](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/work): Professional experience and roles
- [Experiments](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/experiments): Side projects and prototypes
- [Blogs](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/writings): Technical essays (links to full posts on the blog)
- [Talks](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/talks): Conference talks and presentations
- [Contact](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/contact): How to get in touch

## Writing

Full articles are published at https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz. The portfolio writings page highlights selected posts with summaries and links.

- [Sitemap](https://www.nischalnikit.xyz/sitemap.xml)
